novel_features.name: Fare watch
novel_features.description: Track a saved route's price over time and flag drops.
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with local price snapshots in SQLite.
novel_features.example: blacklane-pp-cli watch "San Francisco Airport" "Union Square San Francisco" --at 2026-06-25T15:00 --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to catch chauffeur price drops before a trip.

novel_features.name: Cheapest-window compare
novel_features.description: Quote one route across many departure times to find the cheapest.
novel_features.example: blacklane-pp-cli compare "JFK Airport" "Times Square New York" --dates 2026-06-20T15:00,2026-06-21T15:00 --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when the pickup time is flexible and price matters.

novel_features.name: Multi-leg trip total
novel_features.description: Quote a sequence of legs and total the fares.
novel_features.rationale: Requires sequencing and summing quotes locally.
novel_features.example: blacklane-pp-cli trip --leg "JFK Airport>Times Square New York" --at 2026-06-20T09:00 --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to budget a full day of ground transport.

novel_features.name: Class fit advisor
novel_features.description: Recommend the cheapest vehicle class that fits the party.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining catalog capacity with live price.
novel_features.example: blacklane-pp-cli fit "JFK Airport" "Times Square New York" --pax 3 --bags 4 --at 2026-06-20T15:00 --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to avoid overpaying for more car than you need.

novel_features.name: Quote ledger + search
novel_features.description: Every quote saved to SQLite, full-text searchable and SQL-queryable.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local store of all quotes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to recall and compare past quotes offline.

narrative.headline: Upfront chauffeur quotes from the terminal — transfer and hourly, with a local price history no other tool has.
narrative.value_prop: Quote Blacklane's fixed all-inclusive chauffeur fares (airport transfers and by-the-hour) by address, compare vehicle classes, and keep a searchable local log of every quote. Addresses resolve via OpenStreetMap — no API key, no login, no booking.

quickstart.command: blacklane-pp-cli quote "San Francisco Airport" "Union Square San Francisco" --at 2026-06-25T15:00
quickstart.comment: Point-to-point transfer quote across vehicle classes.
Inspect a vehicle class's models, capacity, and features.

troubleshoots.fix: The route may be outside Blacklane's service area, or the date is in the past — try a major city/airport and a future time.

troubleshoots.symptom: Address resolves to the wrong place
troubleshoots.fix: Pass more specific text or use --pickup-lat/--pickup-lng (and --dropoff-lat/lng) to set coordinates directly.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI to price a chauffeur ride (airport transfer or hourly) without opening the Blacklane site, to compare vehicle classes and departure windows, or to keep an offline, searchable record of quotes. It never books and needs no account.

recipes.title: Quote and keep only class + price
recipes.command: blacklane-pp-cli quote "JFK Airport" "Times Square New York" --at 2026-06-20T15:00 --agent --select packages.title,packages.grossAmount,packages.currency
recipes.explanation: Narrow a verbose quote to just the class and total.

recipes.title: Find the cheapest departure
recipes.command: blacklane-pp-cli compare "JFK Airport" "Times Square New York" --dates 2026-06-20T15:00,2026-06-21T09:00,2026-06-22T09:00 --agent
recipes.explanation: Fan out quotes across times and rank by price.

trigger_phrases: how much is a blacklane to
